typecheck.command: "/Users/tmsincomb/miniforge3/envs/quantdb/bin/python" -c "import pathlib,tomllib; data=tomllib.loads(pathlib.Path('/Users/tmsincomb/Dropbox (Personal)/repos/quantitative-db/pyproject.toml').read_text()); tool=data.get('tool',{}); configured=[name for name in ('mypy','pyright','pytype','basedpyright') if name in tool]; print('NO_TYPECHECKER_CONFIGURED' if not configured else 'TYPECHECKERS=' + ','.join(configured))"

lint.command: cd "/Users/tmsincomb/Dropbox (Personal)/repos/quantitative-db" && "/Users/tmsincomb/miniforge3/envs/quantdb/bin/python" -m pre_commit run isort --files "quantdb/ingest_microct.py" "test/test_ingest_microct.py" && "/Users/tmsincomb/miniforge3/envs/quantdb/bin/python" -m pre_commit run blue --files "quantdb/ingest_microct.py" "test/test_ingest_microct.py"

blockingIssues.description: The ingest milestone contract required an end-to-end `schema SQL -> extract from cassava -> ingest -> verify -> delete -> re-ingest -> verify` flow, but `test/test_ingest_microct.py` seeds synthetic fixture dicts instead of exercising `extract_microct.py`, which leaves `VAL-CROSS-002` unproven and masks real interface mismatches between `extract_microct.py` output and `ingest_microct.py` input.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented in `.factory/library/architecture.md` that `quantdb.values_inst.id_sub` is a required `NOT NULL` column for every inserted instance row.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `db-pipeline-worker` guidance to warn that public cassava access exposes metadata JSON but not the underlying CSV/GraphML file bodies needed for live MicroCT ingest tests, so workers should plan authenticated access or explicitly renegotiate end-to-end test expectations before substituting synthetic fixtures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `ingest-pipeline-and-tests` handoff documents a deviation to synthetic data because the needed file bodies were unavailable through public cassava, and the scrutiny review found that this deviation left `VAL-CROSS-002` untested and hid extractorâ†’ingester schema mismatches.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reconcile the shared lint guidance: either replace the broken flake8-based `lint` command with the supported formatter/pre-commit checks or update the mission guidance so `.factory/services.yaml` and `AGENTS.md` no longer contradict each other.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: During this scrutiny run the configured flake8 lint command failed with `AttributeError: 'EntryPoints' object has no attribute 'get'`, matching the existing `AGENTS.md` note that flake8 is currently incompatible and should be skipped.
